description_long: This object consists of three brown paper shopping bags, each featuring distinct branding from well-known fashion labels: Pepe Jeans London, Desigual, and Lacoste. The bags are rectangular with flat bottoms, allowing them to stand upright, and each has a pair of twisted paper loop handles for carrying. The surface of the bags is matte and slightly textured, typical of kraft paper, with printed logos in black and green. The bags appear empty, as their sides are collapsed inward and the tops are open with no visible contents. The overall construction suggests they are lightweight, flexible, and designed for carrying clothing or small retail items.
description: Three branded brown paper shopping bags with loop handles, featuring Pepe Jeans, Desigual, and Lacoste logos. The bags are upright, empty, and made of matte kraft paper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Pepe Jeans and Lacoste logos on the outer bags, with the Desigual logo visible on the side of the central bag.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the bags, with handles and folded sides visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the Lacoste and Pepe Jeans logos again, with the Desigual bag's side profile in the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thinness and the handles of the bags.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Branding and logos for Pepe Jeans London, Desigual, and Lacoste are printed on the bags in black and green ink.
